presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 02 — Week 3 Close & Week 4 Preview

slides.title: The SPIKE Arc So Far
slides.body:
Week 1 — Find a problem.
Week 2 — Validate the opportunity.
Week 3 — Discover a business model.
slides.speakerNotes: Celebrate the narrative shift. They are venture builders.

slides.title: Week 4 — Build the Business
slides.body: Professional systems, licensing, and venture infrastructure.
slides.speakerNotes: Preview Week 4 without diluting today's win.

slides.title: Week 5 — Launch Yourself
slides.body: Venture Board · Partnership pitch · Public commitment.

slides.title: 120-Hour Gate Confirmation
slides.body: Gate cleared · Remediation if needed · Squad XP

slides.title: Week 3 Close
slides.body: You discovered a business model. Now build it.
slides.speakerNotes: Close with energy. See you Monday — Week 4.
